backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Free Fire theme, Dashboard, Weapons, Characters, Match History) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their purpose, styling, and key functionality for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based light and dark CSS custom properties for colors, borders, and UI tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Free Fire Panel' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing tab state and rendering the Header, four page tabs (Dashboard/Weapons/Characters/Matches), BottomNav, and a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Bottom navigation bar component with four Free Fire-themed tabs (Home, Weapons, Chars, Matches), featuring orange glow active state indicators and Rajdhani typography.
Empty file — no content implemented for the HackProgressBar component.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header component displaying the Free Fire Panel logo, title with Orbitron font, flame icon, and an animated 'LIVE' status indicator with orange glow styling.
frontend/src/components/MatrixRain.tsx: Empty file — no content implemented for the MatrixRain component.
Empty file — no content implemented for the ScanlineOverlay component.
frontend/src/components/TypewriterOutput: Empty file — no content implemented for the TypewriterOutput component.
frontend/src/data/characters.ts: Static data module defining the Character interface and exporting an array of 10 Free Fire characters with their ability names, descriptions, cooldowns, durations, and active/passive types.
frontend/src/data/matchHistory.ts: Defines the Match interface and MatchMode type, and exports an array of 12 sample match history records with stats like kills, damage, placement, and mode.
frontend/src/data/playerStats.ts: Defines the PlayerStats interface and exports a single mock player stats object for 'BLAZER_FF' including KD ratio, win rate, rank, and other performance metrics.
frontend/src/data/weapons.ts: Defines the Weapon interface and WeaponType union, and exports an array of 14 weapons across AR, SMG, Sniper, Shotgun, and Pistol categories with stat values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Rajdhani and Orbitron fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for a dark Free Fire-themed design system, and adds utility component classes like glow effects and custom scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Characters.tsx: Page component that displays a grid of game characters from the characters data file, showing each character's name, ability, type (Active/Passive), description, and cooldown/duration stats with themed styling.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Displays a Free Fire player stats dashboard with an identity card (nickname, UID, rank, level) and stat cards for K/D ratio, win rate, headshot percentage, total matches, and survival time using themed styling.
frontend/src/pages/Matches.tsx: Renders a match history list from static data, showing each match's placement (Booyah or rank), map, mode, kills, damage, and survival time with color-coded styling.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports defined yet.
frontend/src/pages/Scanner.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports defined yet.
frontend/src/pages/Terminal.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports defined yet.
frontend/src/pages/Weapons.tsx: Displays a filterable weapons list by type (AR, SMG, Sniper, Shotgun, Pistol) with stat bars for damage, range, fire rate, reload speed, and magazine size using Free Fire theming.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a Free Fire-themed design system with custom OKLCH color tokens, Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, glow box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state including version, feature list, architectural notes, and image requirements for a Free Fire in-game companion panel app.
